personal.name: Saba Ruknuddin
personal.title: MCA Student | Data Science Enthusiast
personal.tagline: Exploring data-driven solutions and building intelligent applications with AI and machine learning.
personal.bio: I am an MCA student with a strong interest in Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Web Development. I enjoy analyzing data, building machine learning models, and creating user-friendly applications. I am passionate about solving real-world problems using data-driven approaches and continuously improving my technical skills.
personal.currentRoleDescription: Currently pursuing MCA with a focus on Data Science, working on projects involving machine learning, data analysis, and web development.

about.title: About
sections: I am an MCA student specializing in Data Science with a passion for turning data into meaningful insights. I enjoy working with datasets, building predictive models, and visualizing results.
My technical interests include Python programming, machine learning, and web development. I am continuously learning new tools and technologies to enhance my skills.
Apart from academics, I work on personal projects such as web applications and AI-based models, and I enjoy exploring innovative ideas in technology.

experience.title: Student Data Science Developer
experience.description: Working on data science and web development projects including machine learning models, data analysis, and interactive web applications. Gaining hands-on experience in real-world problem solving.

projects.title: Flower Classification using CNN
projects.description: Deep learning model for classifying flower images.
projects.longDescription: Built a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model using TensorFlow and Keras to classify different types of flowers. Implemented image preprocessing, data augmentation, model training, and prediction using a simple web interface.

projects.title: Blog Website
projects.description: Interactive blog platform with login and comments.
projects.longDescription: Developed a blog website with user authentication, posting, and commenting features. Focused on UI/UX and dynamic content handling using JavaScript.
